# Codex 反向证据样本

- 2026-06-18 V2EX：如果方案变成接码、绕过手机号验证，那合规风险太高，不能做。

- 2026-06-17 GitHub Discussion：There are many free alternative docs and open-source CLI wrappers, so a setup helper must be much simpler than reading another tutorial.

- 2026-06-16 小红书评论：如果只是复制教程就没价值，配置太麻烦，除非能真的检查本地配置、密钥状态和错误原因。

- 2026-06-15 Product Hunt review: Privacy is important. The tool should not upload my API keys or local config to a server.
